sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 22

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 22:1
items.html:
(to the question) Gevurot de BON de MA
Aba, plainly, is called MA, and he has a Nukva [female] in his body — that is, the BON side in him, which is the seven lower Sefirot of Chochma of Nekudim, the discernment of the Gevurot [judgments] in him. In the words of the Rav it is always called "Gevurot de BON de MA of Aba"; that is, the Gevurot that are the BON of Aba, who is himself the discernment of MA. (p. 805, Item 102)
